messages.subject: [R-sig-genetics] FW: Landscape Genomics course
messages.body_plain:
Dear all,
 

there are still a few places available for our upcoming Landscape Genomics course, scheduled for June 17-21, 2024, at EPFL in Lausanne, Switzerland.
 
Course website: [ https://www.physalia-courses.org/courses-workshops/course17/ ]( https://www.physalia-courses.org/courses-workshops/course17/ ) 

 Our course will provide a comprehensive overview of this approach, covering everything from obtaining environmental data and processing it with GIS to studying genetic variation and population structure using state-of-the-art methods in the R environment.

This course  is designed to be accessible to all levels of expertise.

Don't miss out on this opportunity to expand your skills and knowledge in landscape genomics! 

Best regards,
Carlo
 
 
 
 
--------------------

Carlo Pecoraro, Ph.D


Physalia-courses DIRECTOR

info at physalia-courses.org

mobile: +49 17645230846

messages.body_plain:
Dear all,
 
we only have 2 remaining seats for the online course on Multivariate data analysis with R and vegan.
 
Dates: May, 27th-31st
 
If interested, please check it out: [ https://www.physalia-courses.org/courses-workshops/vegan/ ]( https://www.physalia-courses.org/courses-workshops/vegan/ )
 
Best regards,
Carlo
 
 

--------------------

Carlo Pecoraro, Ph.D
